subject: Congressional Democrats fail to override the national emergency
body:
Congressional Democrats are having a banner week, and it’s only Tuesday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb0a0ff73b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 26, 2019
---
| | |
# **Congressional Democrats fail to override the national emergency **

**Congressional Democrats** are having a banner week, and it’s only Tuesday.

**After the collapse** of the 2-year, $25 million false Russian collusion debacle over the weekend, House Democrats this afternoon attempted yet again to reverse President Donald J. Trump’s national emergency declaration for our southern border. In the end, despite Democratic control of the House, they fell a few dozen votes short of overriding President Trump’s veto of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s (D-CA) resolution.

**“The Democrat-sponsored resolution** would terminate vital border security operations,” President Trump explained before signing his veto on March 15. “Congress’s vote to deny the crisis on the southern border is a vote against reality.”
🎬 **[Watch: This is what a broken border looks like](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bd74e8754&e=3ee4985eea)**
**Too few in the media** have bothered explaining to the American people why the situation at our southern border is a national emergency in the first place. The reality is that our immigration problem today is vastly different than what it was even just a few years ago.

**In fiscal year 2000,** for example, most U.S. Border Patrol apprehensions were of single adult males. Of these individuals, 95 percent were repatriated within hours. Today, apprehensions largely consist of family units and minors, many of whom end up remaining in the United States for a long time because of loopholes in our immigration laws.

**Smugglers know these loopholes** and exploit them to circumvent our safe, lawful, and secure immigration system. As a result, apprehensions of family units have surged by a jaw-dropping _338 percent_ this year. Daily attempts to cross the southern border illegally have hit a 13-year high, as well.

**Here’s what that means:** “The surge has maxed out the capacity of existing detention centers” near the U.S.–Mexico border, NBC News reported today. “The Department of Homeland Security is now in negotiations with the Department of Defense to detain and care for the overflow on U.S. military bases.”

**In other words,** America’s immigration system is so broken that our military bases may have to become temporary shelters while U.S. courts try to keep up with the case backlog. The President’s national emergency declaration tries to limit the damage by allowing access of up to $3.6 billion in military construction funds for border security.

**Today’s vote** demonstrates yet again that Congress refuses to address the security and humanitarian crisis its own negligence has created. It should at least allow President Trump to use his executive authority to step in and fix it.

[President Trump stands by his declaration of a national emergency](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b1f7cfa108&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The Green New Deal goes 0-57 in the Senate**

**Today,** **Senate Democrats** were given a chance to show Americans exactly where they stand on the far left’s “Green New Deal” proposal.

**The Green New Deal** isn’t "socialism lite:" It’s a full-scale government takeover meant to reshape every aspect of Americans’ lives from Washington. The blueprint, unveiled by self-described Democratic Socialist Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY), would eliminate fossil fuels completely, upgrade or replace every single building in the United States, and aim to get rid of “polluting” commodities such as cattle and airplanes.

**As one of North America’s** most prominent labor unions put it: “It is difficult to take this unrealistic manifesto seriously, but the economic and social devastation it would cause if it moves forward is serious and real.”

**This afternoon,** Senate Democrats were caught between working Americans, who reject socialism, and their far-left base, who embraces it. What they chose to do was remarkable: Rather than register their opinion on the Green New Deal, dozens of Democrats simply voted “present” on the resolution to bring it to the floor for a vote. Three joined their Republican colleagues in rejecting it, resulting in a final tally of 0-57.

[_Watch: The Green New Deal saga just got even more absurd._](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d286d449a1&e=3ee4985eea)
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: 12 years' worth of my latest tax returns
body:
Demand transparency.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c18/2ae112ef/13e80813/357d9fb1/4167326231/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c18/2ae112ef/13e80813/357d9fb1/4167326231/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
I just posted my latest tax returns online. In fact, my tax returns for every year I've been in office are public for anyone who wants to see.
I've always believed that holding elected office means that voters should know, beyond a shadow of a doubt, that my top priority is the public's best interest. And now, as we fight to defeat Donald Trump, I believe we need honesty, transparency and accountability more than ever.
_Every_ Democratic candidate for president should follow my lead and release their tax returns, too. No candidate should expect to beat Trump if they can't live up to the standards voters will rightfully demand of both candidates.
**That 's why we're looking for 10,000 people to stand with us in this call for transparency and accountability before midnight, and I'm asking you to raise your voice with us right now: **[Add your name to call on every Democratic candidate to release their tax returns and make sure this field upholds the honesty, transparency and accountability that the American people deserve from those they elect to office--especially their president.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://action.kirstengillibrand.com/demand-transparency?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2968-ja-gfp-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.kirstengillibrand.com%2Fkg-demand-transparency")****
[SIGN THE PETITION.
DEMAND TRANSPARENCY.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://action.kirstengillibrand.com/demand-transparency?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2968-ja-gfp-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.kirstengillibrand.com%2Fkg-demand-transparency")
I'm running for president to fight for you and no one else. My values have never been for sale. That's why, from the very beginning, I've made it clear exactly who it is I'm serving--_the people_.
It's why I became the first member of Congress to put a list of my official meetings, earmark requests, personal financial disclosures and taxes online. It's why I passed the Stock Act to ban insider trading by members of Congress and their families. And it's why I've banned corporate PAC money from my campaign, am refusing donations from federal lobbyists and don't have a super PAC.
**We have the power to fundamentally change the way our government works. We can rid Washington of the toxic influence of special interests that stack the odds against working families. We can restore transparency and accountability to the White House. But only if we come together to stand united in this fight. If you 're with me, I need you to add your name to speak out now.**
**[Sign the petition demanding the entire Democratic field follow my lead and publicly release their tax returns. You deserve complete transparency from your president, and making sure you get it from your Democratic nominee is a crucial first step.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://action.kirstengillibrand.com/demand-transparency?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2968-ja-gfp-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.kirstengillibrand.com%2Fkg-demand-transparency")**
Thank you for joining me today in taking brave, bold action toward progress.
Kirsten
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c18/2ae112ef/13e80813/357d9fb3/4167326231/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What I’m about to tell you is unprecedented
body:
Something remarkable is happening:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq)

[**We have a chance to make history by reaching 1 million contributions by this week's fundraising deadline. Getting there is a bit of a stretch but it’s worth trying. Please contribute today to help us try and reach this goal.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10352?refcode=em190327-1-90&t=2&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq)
* * *
Something remarkable is happening. We are approaching a critical fundraising deadline this week, after which we will publicly report not just how much money we have raised, but how many people have made a contribution to our campaign.
And this deadline gives us the chance to make presidential election history: **we may be able to say that our supporters have made 1 million contributions this quarter.**
It's a stretch to reach that goal this early. It would be unprecedented. Yet I believe that it's possible to get there if we all come together.
Are you in to help us try?
[**Help us reach 1 million online contributions by this week’s deadline. Please contribute to our campaign to try and meet this unprecedented goal.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10352?refcode=em190327-1-90&t=4&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq)
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10352?refcode=em190327-1-90&t=5&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq)
Having more than 1 million contributions would be absolutely, totally historic this early in a Democratic primary. In our 2016 race, we didn’t reach that number until our 6th month.
In this race, we are in our 6th week.
It used to be that after every one of these deadlines, the political media would talk about how many Wall Street executives contributed how many millions of dollars to prop up the corrupt system that helps them get rich.
Now they measure a campaign’s strength by the number of donations it receives from people all across the country.
And reaching this historic and unprecedented goal would leave no doubt that ours is the largest, strongest grassroots campaign capable of beating Trump.
[**Please chip in to help reach our goal of 1 million online contributions by our fundraising deadline.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10352?refcode=em190327-1-90&t=30&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq)
I cannot thank you enough for all of your support, dedication, and sacrifices for our campaign. We have shown that a political revolution is possible. Now let's show what we can do with it.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10352?refcode=em190327-1-90&t=31&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq)

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

If you want to receive less emails, [just tell us here](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=33&akid=842%2E150750%2Eh6haDq). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

We have an official FEC fundraising deadline coming up and we're trying to report as many individual donations as we possibly can. body:

In a few days, we will close the books on our quarterly fundraising report. When those numbers are made public, Trump and his team will be going through with a fine-toothed comb, trying to see how much of a threat we really are. That’s why we need to raise as much as we can before midnight on March 31. So I am asking you directly: Will you make another contribution to my presidential campaign to ensure our team has the resources to come out ahead of whatever Trump and his allies have planned for us in the months ahead? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I am running for president to put our government back in the hands of the people we are elected to serve. That’s why I am not taking a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. I don’t answer to them. I answer to people like you -- and I want you to know that as you consider contributing to our campaign today. With your help, I know we are going to win this thing. Thanks for all you do. For The People, — Kamala PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE

subject: On the Green New Deal, the Democrats Are All Yellow
body:
The Washington Examiner editorial board writes that the Green New Deal is a profoundly embarrassing and politically damaging proposal for Democrats. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dcb311c174&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **On the Green New Deal, the Democrats Are All Yellow**

The _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes that the Green New Deal is a profoundly embarrassing and politically damaging proposal for Democrats—which is probably why not a single one of them voted for it yesterday.

“Faced with a day-of debate on their own embarrassing resolution, Democrats spent their floor time trying to blame Republicans for not taking global warming seriously enough. But if Democrats took it seriously, and didn't just view it as a potential source of donations from gullible millenarian millennials, they would not have fallen in line behind this ludicrous unicorns-and-rainbows proposal in the first place.”

[**Click here to continue reading.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05a8defe9b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Attorney General William Barr told Congress Sunday that special counsel Robert Mueller did not find collusion between the Trump campaign and the Russian government, destroying two years of media speculation and bad reporting,” Amber Athey writes in _[**The Daily Caller**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=585f78f01f&e=3ee4985eea)_. “In light of Mueller concluding his investigation, we’ve compiled a list of some of the worst media screwups in the history of Russia theories.”
---
|
---
| Now that Special Counsel Robert Mueller has dispatched the Russia collusion theories, _[**The Wall Street Journal**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3172a3f6a1&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes, one has to ask “how did the partisan propaganda known as the Steele dossier become the basis for an unprecedented FBI probe of a presidential campaign, an abuse of law enforcement, and two years of media and political hysteria? . . . Its authors and promoters should be held accountable.”
---
|
---
| “House Democrats on Tuesday failed to override President Trump’s first veto as part of their battle over border security, representing a victory for the administration that allows the president's declaration of a national emergency at the U.S.-Mexico border to stand,” Andrew O’Reilly reports for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d74f34e50f&e=3ee4985eea). President Trump called it a “BIG WIN today.”
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump is coming back to Kentucky. The adviser to President Donald Trump will tour Toyota’s largest manufacturing plant in Georgetown on Thursday,” _[**The Associated Press**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d6a3f0b2d&e=3ee4985eea)_ reports. “Toyota Motor North America CEO Jim Lentz and Toyota Motor Manufacturing Kentucky President Susan Elkington are scheduled to sign the White House’s Pledge to American Workers,” an “effort to encourage private employers to adequately train their workers.”
---
|

name: Bob Menendez
subject: Friend, what issues matter most to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

In my years serving New Jersey, I've spent my time taking on the real issues facing our state and our nation.

But to best represent you, I need to know what issues you consider to be most important. That's why I want to hear from you today.

**[Please take a moment to fill out this short survey and let me know what issues are most important to you.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c9f/74d715b9/19b0ae4c/1f4bc60f/2064090034/VEsH/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5969&source=em19_190327_surv_engg_gq_nopn_tts_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190327_surv_engg_gq_nopn_tts_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Please+take+a+moment+to+fill+out+this+sh")**

I know there is a lot of chaos coming from Washington right now. With the Trump Administration's attacks on our healthcare, our environment, and our immigrant communities, there is so much at stake.

In the Senate, I've been fighting back against the Trump Administration. In the past few weeks, I've introduced legislation to make sure our government combats climate change, declares reproductive rights are human rights, and repeals Trump's cap on state and local income tax deductions.

But there's a lot more work to do, and I don't want to risk missing an opportunity to bring about the changes you most want to see. I can't solve the big problems alone -- I need to know what issues are at the top of your list.

**[Please let me know what issues you want to see Congress address as we move forward -- take a moment to fill out this short survey.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c9f/74d715b9/19b0ae4c/1f4bc670/2064090034/VEsE/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5969&source=em19_190327_surv_engg_gq_nopn_tts_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190327_surv_engg_gq_nopn_tts_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Please+let+me+know+what+issues+you+want+")**

Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

Bob | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c9f/74d715b9/19b0ae4c/1f4bc671/2064090034/VEsF/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/issues-survey?gpsid=39_73_5969&source=em19_190327_surv_engg_gq_nopn_tts_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190327_surv_engg_gq_nopn_tts_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY")

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Farmer’s Bill of Rights Rally This Weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I wanted to give you a heads up about something cool happening this Saturday. On March 30, at 10:30 am, at the Storm Lake High School gym, Family Farm Action will be hosting the Farmer’s Bill of Rights rally (see info **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5670662/49847879/2104169560?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmU4ZWQ4YS1lZDUwLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4Nzg0ZGI2MGUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRnFrdZ4DGw79Y_5BIByPOaPKFqBOiItTUQTr5siElQ=)**).
The rally will take place before the first major multi-candidate 2020 Democratic Presidential event, **[the Heartland Forum](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5670663/49847880/898526605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmU4ZWQ4YS1lZDUwLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4Nzg0ZGI2MGUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRnFrdZ4DGw79Y_5BIByPOaPKFqBOiItTUQTr5siElQ=)**. Farmers and rural enthusiasts from all over the nation will be coming together and Farm Aid plans to have Country legend Willie Nelson record a video for the rally. I will be a featured speaker and my **[Working Hero Action video](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5670664/49847881/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmU4ZWQ4YS1lZDUwLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4Nzg0ZGI2MGUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRnFrdZ4DGw79Y_5BIByPOaPKFqBOiItTUQTr5siElQ=&v=7Q6_TBPwmPg)** highlighting the abuse of the Renewable Fuel Standard will be shown as well.
This morning, I announced that I’ll be taking _Sioux City Sue_ , the RV I campaigned in, to the rally. If there are any farmers between Sioux City and Storm Lake that want a ride, please contact Working Hero or email me at [jd@workingheroaction.org](mailto:jd@workingheroaction.org?subject=Working%20Hero%20Iowa).
As many of you know, I talked a lot about market consolidation in the Ag economy squeezing our farmers. More and more people/campaigns are starting to talk about the importance of this issue. So much so that Ryan Grim, of The Intercept, tweeted this:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5670665/49847882/838911656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmU4ZWQ4YS1lZDUwLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4Nzg0ZGI2MGUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRnFrdZ4DGw79Y_5BIByPOaPKFqBOiItTUQTr5siElQ=)
**[Family Farm Action](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5670666/49847883/319916322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmU4ZWQ4YS1lZDUwLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4Nzg0ZGI2MGUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRnFrdZ4DGw79Y_5BIByPOaPKFqBOiItTUQTr5siElQ=)** has been a leader in fighting for farmers in a time when Wall St. is dictating our Farm Policy. If you’re able, please contribute to their cause: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/farmaction](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5670667/49847884/639343572?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmU4ZWQ4YS1lZDUwLWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4Nzg0ZGI2MGUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRnFrdZ4DGw79Y_5BIByPOaPKFqBOiItTUQTr5siElQ=)**
Family Farm Action will be donating $.25 of every dollar raised at the rally to FarmAid's disaster relief fund to support farmers and ranchers affected by the recent flooding.
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
P.S. A special thank you to the following for their support of this rally:
_**Featured Sponsor**_ : Family Farm Action and Organization for Competitive Markets
_**Sponsors**_ : Working Hero Action and Regeneration International
_**Participating Organizations**_ : Association of American Indian Farmers, American Grassfed Association, Farm Aid, National Black Farmers Association, National Family Farm Coalition, Indiana Farmers Union and Wisconsin Farmers Union.

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

subject: First Lady of Venezuela visits the White House
body:
Venezuelan Interim President Juan Guaido is a tremendous leader working hard to free his country from the grips of a socialist dictatorship. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90f067c8da&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 27, 2019
---
| | |
# **First Lady of Venezuela visits the White House**

**Venezuelan Interim President Juan Guaido** is a tremendous leader working hard to free his country from the grips of a socialist dictatorship. Today, President Donald J. Trump welcomed his wife, Interim First Lady Fabiana Rosales, to the White House.

**Venezuela’s story is unfathomable.** Once the wealthiest country in South America, years of massive wealth confiscation, suppressed free speech, and rigged elections have brought the country to the brink of ruin. Today, nearly 90 percent of Venezuelans live in poverty. In 2018, hyperinflation in Venezuela exceeded a staggering _1 million_ percent.

**“Everything's broken** ,” President Trump said today of the Maduro regime’s destruction. “They have no water . . . The lights are out.”

**First Lady Rosales** thanked the United States today for its leadership on the world stage. In January, Venezuela’s National Assembly invoked its constitutional right to declare Guaido, President of the Assembly, as the country’s legitimate leader. Within 30 minutes, America was the first nation in the world to officially recognize President Guaido.

**“To see [President Guaido]** and his courageous wife stand before the crowds and take that oath of office under the constitution of Venezuela was inspiring not just to people across our hemisphere and across this country, but all over the world,” Vice President Mike Pence said before today’s bilateral meeting between U.S. and Venezuelan officials. In the days that followed that oath, the Maduro regime unleashed untold horror—blocking humanitarian aid, killing innocent civilians, and burning medical supplies.

**“Eighty percent of the population** in Venezuela has no power. They are trying to break our morale,” Ms. Rosales said today. “They want to submerge us in eternal darkness. But let me tell you that there is light, and the light is here.”

**America and the rest of the world** are watching closely. The Venezuelan people do not stand alone.

[See President Trump host Venezuela’s First Lady at the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd7a169aaa&e=3ee4985eea).

**More:** [Vice President Pence kicks off today’s bilateral meeting ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54552e474b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump presents the Medal of Honor**

**Travis W. Atkins** first enlisted in the United States Army in 2000. Following a tour of duty in Iraq, he was honorably discharged from service as a Sergeant. But after attending the University of Montana, Atkins felt called to serve once again—and reenlisted in 2005. He was deployed to Iraq the following summer.

**On June 1, 2007,** Staff Sergeant Atkins engaged in hand-to-hand combat with a suspected insurgent. During the exchange, Atkins quickly realized the man had a suicide vest strapped to his body. Without hesitation, Atkins tackled the insurgent, using his own body to shield his fellow soldiers from the imminent explosion.

**Staff Sergeant Atkins’** heroic actions, at the cost of his own life, saved the lives of three American service members. Today, President Trump commemorated the selfless sacrifice of Staff Sergeant Atkins by [awarding him a posthumous Medal of Honor](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb5d0de537&e=3ee4985eea).

**“Today the name** of Staff Sergeant Travis Atkins will be etched alongside of the names of America’s bravest warriors and written forever into America’s heart,” the President said.

[Watch President Trump present the Medal of Honor.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd9299167a&e=3ee4985eea)

|
---
|
